title: Revocation of License of a Partnership Due to Death or Withdrawal of
content: 27 Partner. Unless otherwise provided in the Articles of Partnership, the license of a 28 partnership shall be automatically revoked upon the death or withdrawal of a partner 29 which materially interrupts the course of business or results in the dissolution of the 30 partnership. The surviving partner/s shall, within ten (10) calendar days, report such death 31 or withdrawal to the Department. Failure to report shall automatically include the surviving 32 partner/s in the list of persons with a derogatory record. 33 34
